response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio of 'Gurenge' matches the provided lyrics and arrangement. The dialogue in the second half perfectly matches the English transcript.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided lyrics and translations to ensure maximum accuracy, adapting timestamps to align tightly with the VTuber's performance.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the musical performance carefully, capturing back-to-back rapid lines and overlapping backing lyrics where applicable. Dialogue segments are carefully partitioned based on spoken turns and emotional phrasing.

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 泥だらけの走馬灯に酔う
subtitles.english: I'm intoxicated by the mud-covered lantern slides

subtitles.original: こわばる心...
subtitles.english: This stubborn heart...

subtitles.original: 震える手は掴みたいものがある それだけさ
subtitles.english: and trembling hands, there is something I want to grab, that's all

subtitles.original: 夜の匂いに... (I'll spend all thirty days and nights)
subtitles.english: Even if I glare at the night sky... (I'll spend all thirty days and nights)

subtitles.original: 空睨んでも... (staring into the sky)
subtitles.english: staring into the sky...

subtitles.original: 変わっていけるのは自分自身だけ
subtitles.english: the only thing I can change is myself,

subtitles.original: それだけさ
subtitles.english: that's all

subtitles.original: 強くなれる理由を知った
subtitles.english: I've learned the reason I can become stronger

subtitles.original: 僕を連れて進め
subtitles.english: Take me with you, move forward

subtitles.original: どうしたって! 消せない夢も
subtitles.english: Even with dreams that can never be erased no matter what

subtitles.original: 止まれない今も
subtitles.english: Even in this present moment that I cannot stop

subtitles.original: 誰かのために強くなれるなら
subtitles.english: If I can become stronger for the sake of someone

subtitles.original: ありがとう 悲しみよ
subtitles.english: Thank you, sorrow

subtitles.original: 世界に打ちのめされて負ける意味を知った
subtitles.english: Beaten down by the world, I learned the meaning of losing

subtitles.original: 紅蓮の華よ咲き誇れ!
subtitles.english: Bloom proudly, crimson lotus!

subtitles.original: 運命を照らして
subtitles.english: Light up my fate

subtitles.original: イナビカリの雑音が耳を刺す
subtitles.english: The noise of lightning pierces my ears

subtitles.original: 戸惑う心...
subtitles.english: My confused heart...

subtitles.original: 優しいだけじゃ守れないものがある? わかってるけど
subtitles.english: Is not enough just by being gentle, are there things I cannot protect? I know, but...

subtitles.original: 水面下で絡まる善悪
subtitles.english: Good and evil tangled below the surface

subtitles.original: 透けて見える偽善に天罰
subtitles.english: Divine punishment for the transparent hypocrisy

subtitles.original: (tell me why, tell me why, tell me why, tell me, I don't need you)
subtitles.english: Tell me why, tell me why, tell me why, tell me, I don't need you

subtitles.original: 逸材の花より 挑み続け咲いた一輪が美しい
subtitles.english: It is more beautiful to be the one single flower that kept challenging and bloomed, than a talented flower

subtitles.original: 乱暴に敷き詰められたトゲだらけの道も
subtitles.english: Even the road covered in thorns, violently spread

subtitles.original: 本気の僕だけに現れるから
subtitles.english: It only appears to the real me

subtitles.original: 乗り越えてみせるよ
subtitles.english: So I will show I can overcome it

subtitles.original: 簡単に片付けられた守れなかった夢も
subtitles.english: Even the dreams that were easily put away and could not be protected

subtitles.original: 紅蓮の心臓に根を生やし
subtitles.english: Taking root in the crimson heart

subtitles.original: この血に宿ってる
subtitles.english: Residing in this blood

subtitles.original: 人知れず儚い 散りゆく結末
subtitles.english: Secretly and fleetingly, the ending of scattering

subtitles.original: 無情に破れた 悲鳴の風吹く
subtitles.english: Ruthlessly broken, the wind of screams blows

subtitles.original: 誰かの笑う影 誰かの泣き声
subtitles.english: Someone's laughing shadow, someone's crying voice

subtitles.original: 誰もが幸せを願ってる
subtitles.english: Everyone is wishing for happiness

subtitles.original: どうしたって! 消せない夢も...
subtitles.english: Even with dreams that can never be erased no matter what...

subtitles.original: 止まれない今も...
subtitles.english: Even in this present moment that I cannot stop...

subtitles.original: 誰かのために強くなれるなら...
subtitles.english: If I can become stronger for the sake of someone...

subtitles.original: ありがとう 悲しみよ
subtitles.english: Thank you, sorrow

subtitles.original: 世界に打ちのめされて負ける意味を知った
subtitles.english: Beaten down by the world, I learned the meaning of losing

subtitles.original: 紅蓮の華よ咲き誇れ!
subtitles.english: Bloom proudly, crimson lotus!

subtitles.original: 運命を照らして...
subtitles.english: Light up my fate...

subtitles.original: 運命を照らして
subtitles.english: Light up my fate

subtitles.original: Oh no! Everything is burned down! My house and the entire village is destroyed!
subtitles.english: Oh no! Everything is burned down! My house and the entire village is destroyed!

subtitles.original: What is going on? Are you alright?
subtitles.english: What is going on? Are you alright?

subtitles.original: A giant monster... burned down my entire village with its fire breath.
subtitles.english: A giant monster... burned down my entire village with its fire breath.

subtitles.original: That is bad! Do you know where that monster is heading?
subtitles.english: That is bad! Do you know where that monster is heading?

subtitles.original: I think it's headed to the next village.
subtitles.english: I think it's headed to the next village.

subtitles.original: Don't worry. I shall take care of it for you so it won't destroy the other village too!
subtitles.english: Don't worry. I shall take care of it for you so it won't destroy the other village too!

subtitles.original: In order to do that, I need to collect power by singing and music.
subtitles.english: In order to do that, I need to collect power by singing and music.

subtitles.original: So please, lend me your power, oh dear villager!
subtitles.english: So please, lend me your power, oh dear villager!

subtitles.original: Oh! I will!
subtitles.english: Oh! I will!
